name: Shared Workspace (Evolved)
description: A fully evolved shared workspace with all expansion properties. This represents a mature workspace where agents make autonomous decisions, watch for conditions proactively, send messages, generate reports, and track their own team. Most workspaces should NOT start here — start with the 5-property starter (workspace-starter.json) and grow as needs emerge.

properties.name: Context
properties.description: Current state summary for this record — what's happening, what matters most, and what's next. Any participant (agent or human) can rewrite this when they have a materially updated understanding. This is the 'start here' for anyone engaging with this entity. Should be a concise narrative (1-3 paragraphs) covering: current situation, active priorities, recent changes, and recommended next actions. Replaced on each update — not a history, but the latest understanding.

properties.name: Updates
properties.description: Chronological record of what happened on this entity. Each entry is an object: { author (who contributed this — agent ID, user name, or system name), type (observation | action | change | milestone), summary (one-line description), details (full context if needed), timestamp (ISO 8601) }. Append only — never update or delete existing entries. This is the timeline that keeps all participants aware of what others have done.

properties.name: Tasks
properties.description: Action items for this entity. Each entry is an object: { title, description (enough context that anyone picking this up understands what to do and why), status (pending | in_progress | done | cancelled), owner (who should do this — agent ID, role, or person name), createdBy (who created this task), priority (low | medium | high | urgent), dueDate (ISO 8601 or null), outcome (result description when completed, null otherwise) }. Any participant can create tasks. Any participant can update status on tasks they own or observe.

properties.name: Notes
properties.description: Knowledge, observations, and ideas from any contributor. Each entry is an object: { author, content (the note itself), category (observation | analysis | idea | reference | question), timestamp (ISO 8601) }. Append only — notes are permanent.

properties.name: Issues
properties.description: Problems, blockers, risks, and concerns. Each entry is an object: { title, description, severity (low | medium | high | critical), status (open | investigating | resolved | dismissed), raisedBy, resolvedBy, resolution, timestamp (ISO 8601) }. Critical severity = implicit escalation.

properties.name: Decisions
properties.description: Record of decisions made about this entity, with full reasoning — the explainability layer. Each entry is an object: { question (what was being decided), decision (chosen action), reasoning (why this choice — include data points and logic), alternatives (array of other options considered), confidence (low | medium | high), autonomous (boolean — true if agent decided alone), approvedBy (user ID or null), timestamp (ISO 8601) }. Immutable — decisions are historical record. If reversed, add a new decision explaining why.

properties.name: Messages Sent
properties.description: Record of outbound communications related to this entity. Each entry is an object: { channel (email | slack | sms | push | in_app | webhook), recipient, subject (if applicable), summary (what was sent — not the full body), sentAt (ISO 8601), triggeredBy (task ID, agent name, or 'manual'), status (sent | failed | scheduled) }. Immutable — communication history should never be altered.

properties.name: Monitors
properties.description: Persistent conditions to watch for on each agent cycle. Each entry is an object: { target (what to watch), description (why it matters), type (threshold | change_detection | schedule | absence), frequency (every_pulse | daily | weekly), action (notify | escalate | auto_act), status (active | paused | retired), createdBy, lastChecked (ISO 8601), lastResult (ok | triggered | error) }. Agents update status and lastChecked on each cycle.

properties.name: Alerts
properties.description: Notifications requiring human attention. Each entry is an object: { title, severity (info | warning | critical), category (anomaly | threshold | reminder | escalation | opportunity), message, targetAudience (user | team | manager), action (notify | escalate | auto_act), status (open | acknowledged | resolved | dismissed), acknowledgedBy, resolvedAt, timestamp (ISO 8601) }. Agents create alerts. Humans acknowledge or dismiss them.

properties.name: Reports
properties.description: Periodic summaries generated from workspace activity. Each entry is an object: { title, content (markdown-formatted report), period (e.g., 'week of 2026-02-17'), generatedBy, audience, highlights (array of 3-5 key findings), timestamp (ISO 8601) }. Immutable — reports are snapshots in time.

properties.name: Participants
properties.description: Registry of all agents, humans, and systems contributing to this workspace. Each entry is an object: { participantId, type (agent | human | system), role (owner | contributor | observer | approver), scope (what this participant focuses on), lastActive (ISO 8601), status (active | paused | retired) }. Updated when participants join, leave, or change roles.
